Embrace
Digital Transformation

Digital disruption keeps challenging companies and businesses.

Media organizations need to embrace these digital disruptions, adapt and transform their strategies for survival and success.

The Three Pillars of IQ Media Hub

1
The Academy

The Academy hosts different online courses, workshops and talks every month

2
Collaborations

Media professionals collaborate and innovate to enhance their businesses.

3
R&D Lab

In response to a reality full of financial difficulties, the R&D Labshares Digital Business Transformation strategies and best practices.

Lab News

The latest and greatest news from our lab and our partners about digital transformation.

Our Vision
Maybe a subtitle

Create the future Market Leaders and contribute to the shift of the news industry towards having a digital core in which most of the journalistic routines, news products, business models, and value chains will be digitised to the maximum extent. Εnsure your future success

Join Us.

Ready to embark on a journey of media excellence and innovation? Join IQ Media Hub and become part of a vibrant community dedicated to transforming the digital landscape.
